title: Best Buddys
description: Best Buddys adds animated 3D companions to Minecraft. Choose a buddy, customize it with headwear and held items, and let it follow you through singleplayer, multiplayer, and servers that do not have the mod installed.
body:
# Best Buddys

**Best Buddys** adds animated 3D companions to Minecraft. Choose a buddy, customize it with headwear and held items, and let it follow you through singleplayer, multiplayer, and servers that do not have the mod installed.

![Best Buddys Wardrobe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YqJkDbW2/images/dce6dacdfdfe435008a4cb8069244ca1266c22fa_350.webp)

## Features

- One active buddy per player.
- Buddies: Duck, Small Duck, Cat, Baby Cat, Baby Golem, Complex Golem, and Giant Golem.
- Accessories: Cap, Hat, and Crown.
- Held items: Sword and Trident.
- Separate saved settings for every buddy.
- Client-side companion rendering for vanilla server support.
- Optional server-side sync so other modded players can see your buddy.
- No real buddy entities are spawned.

![Buddy Selection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YqJkDbW2/images/16e9d9fe6e85b00d5552274663ec39843bca9893.png)

## 3D Wardrobe

Open the **Best Buddys** wardrobe from the Options screen, Main Menu, or Pause Menu. The wardrobe lets you choose a buddy, equip accessories, select held items, and adjust movement settings.

![3D Buddy Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YqJkDbW2/images/04233fbe935cb4e2b7eff221047cd2989bc993e5.png)

## Buddies

Every buddy has its own scale, movement style, idle animation, accessory placement, and held-item placement. Ducks waddle, cats move with a smoother four-legged walk, and golems feel heavier while still staying companion-friendly.

![Buddy Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YqJkDbW2/images/8ffb3dc5a1deb5e7d1c22c5a16deb5ec02fb9e82_350.webp)

## Multiplayer

Best Buddys is designed to work comfortably in normal multiplayer:

- Vanilla or unmodded server: your own buddy still works locally.
- Modded server: other modded players can see your buddy, accessory, held item, and movement settings.
- Buddies stay visual-only and do not affect gameplay balance.

![Best Buddys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YqJkDbW2/images/26559c4a8abae0e3e5f91919423ee6e483753ca6_350.webp)

## Requirements

- Minecraft: `1.21.4`, `1.21.11`, `26.1`, `26.1.1`, or `26.1.2`
- Fabric Loader: `0.17.3` or newer
- Fabric API
- Client required
- Server optional for multiplayer sync
